Configurations, drivers, system functions, utilities, boot tests, firmware management, error handling, and standby operations for Pebble firmware.

## Folders
- **[board](board/README.md)**: Configurations and data structures for board power, button management, and display settings.
- **[drivers](drivers/README.md)**: Drivers for display, flash, STM32 microcontrollers, and functions for buttons, CRC, serial, GPIO, OTP, RTC, and watchdog.
- **[system](system/README.md)**: Functions and definitions for boot management, firmware storage, system reset, and RTC registers.
- **[util](util/README.md)**: Macros and functions for attributes, delays, and mathematical operations in C.

## Files
- **[boot_tests.c](boot_tests.c.md)**: Tests for detecting stuck buttons and broken flash memory during boot.
- **[boot_tests.h](boot_tests.h.md)**: Declares functions to check if a button is stuck or if flash memory is broken.
- **[firmware.h](firmware.h.md)**: Defines firmware offsets and a function to check if the firmware is "new world."
- **[flash_region.h](flash_region.h.md)**: Defines memory regions for firmware scratch and safe firmware storage.
- **[fw_copy.c](fw_copy.c.md)**: Manages firmware updates, including validation, erasure, writing, and recovery firmware handling.
- **[fw_copy.h](fw_copy.h.md)**: Functions for checking firmware updates and switching to recovery firmware mode.
- **[git_version.auto.h.in](git_version.auto.h.in.md)**: Header file for defining Git version information with placeholders for timestamp, tag, and version details.
- **[hardfault_handler.c](hardfault_handler.c.md)**: Handles hard faults by logging the event and either entering a breakpoint loop or performing a system reset.
- **[main.c](main.c.md)**: Bootloader for Pebble firmware that manages system initialization, error handling, and firmware loading.
- **[pebble_errors.h](pebble_errors.h.md)**: Defines error codes for firmware and Bluetooth issues in the Pebble firmware.
- **[standby.c](standby.c.md)**: Manages standby mode operations, including wakeup conditions and entering/exiting standby.
- **[standby.h](standby.h.md)**: Functions to manage entering, checking, and leaving standby mode for the board.
- **[startup_stm32.c](startup_stm32.c.md)**: Initializes firmware startup for STM32, including vector table and memory section setup.
- **[stm32f_flash_boot.ld.in](stm32f_flash_boot.ld.in.md)**: Linker script for STM32F2xx microcontrollers defining memory layout and section placement.
